TravelTips.title: Egypt Travel Tips
TravelTips.subtitle: Essential information for your trip to Sharm El Sheikh
TravelTips.visaDesc: Most nationalities can obtain a visa on arrival at Egyptian airports. Check your country's requirements before traveling.
TravelTips.packingDesc: Light clothing, sunscreen (SPF 50+), hat, sunglasses. Modest dress recommended for cultural sites.
TravelTips.tippingDesc: Tipping is customary in Egypt. 10-15% at restaurants; small amounts for guides and drivers.
TravelTips.sharmDesc: Year-round destination. October–April for mild weather; May–September for diving (warmer water).
TravelTips.desertDesc: Early morning or late afternoon to avoid midday heat.
TravelTips.stayHydratedDesc: Drink plenty of water, especially during desert and water activities.
TravelTips.respectCustomsDesc: Dress modestly when visiting religious or traditional areas.
TravelTips.bargainingDesc: Common in local markets; be polite and friendly.
TravelTips.needHelpDesc: Our team is here 24/7. Contact us for any questions or assistance.
